---
name: Report an incorrect result
about: Report a FreshSense prediction, rejection, or warning that looked incorrect
title: "[Beta] Incorrect result"
labels: "beta-feedback, model-quality"
assignees: ""
---

## What happened?

Describe the result that looked incorrect or confusing.

## Expected result

Describe what you expected after manually inspecting the fruit.

## Test conditions

- FreshSense version:
- Fruit type:
- Phone or camera:
- Lighting:
- Background:
- Was one fruit type clearly visible?

## Optional photo

Attach a test photo only if you choose to share it. Remove people, addresses,
documents, or other personal details first. FreshSense does not automatically
attach or upload the analyzed photo.

## Safety confirmation

- [ ] I understand that FreshSense provides visual decision support and cannot determine whether food is safe to eat.
